views.markdown: If you need help with "弹幕助手", you can contact 俊宏, the developer, via e-mail.
俊宏 is the maintainer of the package "弹幕助手". Please contact them via email for any questions on this version of the package.
If you found a mistake in the depiction or cannot download the package, you can reach out to the maintainer of the "俊宏" repo, 俊宏.
